name: Guild Master Hendricks
greeting: A lean man with sharp eyes looks up from a spread of maps. 'Another adventurer. Good. We have three contracts here — goblins in the forest, an orc on the dark road, and something ancient in the ruins. Captain Bren at the Guard House has a fourth. All dangerous, all honest pay.'

dialogue.response: 'Organized raid — three or more working together. The forest road isn't safe until they're cleared. Thirty gold for the job. Type: accept goblin_hunt'
'Big, scarred brute. Been preying on merchants using the dark forest road. Forty gold to put it down. Type: accept orc_bounty'
'The Obsidian Dungeon leads east into old Velian stonework. Our last scout reported a powerful undead presence — an Ancient Wraith. Fifty gold for destroying it. Type: accept ruins_investigation'
'Membership is earned, not bought. Complete a contract successfully and I'll consider it. We don't take raw recruits — we take proven adventurers.'
'Three open: goblin_hunt (30g), orc_bounty (40g), ruins_investigation (50g). Ask me about any of them, or type accept <quest_id> to take one.'
